summary: CRITICAL FAILURE: Deliverable is non-functional. Missing test fixtures (mixed-secrets.json, all-ok.json, all-expired.json) referenced in workflow will cause immediate failure. Requirements explicitly mandate bats-core testing framework and red/green TDD, but deliverable has zero bats test files and embeds ad-hoc assertions in workflow steps instead. No act-result.txt artifact provided. Workflow will not execute via 'act' without fixtures. Script itself (secret-rotation-validator.sh) is well-written with proper error handling, but entire test infrastructure is absent/incorrect. No actionlint validation shown. Violates core requirements fundamentally.
